title: A Day in Fethiye's Harbor and Rock Tombs
description: Spend a themed day in Muğla: Fethiye Harbor, Paspatur Old Town (Old City), Amintas Rock Tombs, Understone Coffee Fethiye.
notes: Take a stroll along the bay.
Explore the narrow shopping streets of the old city.
A legacy of ancient Lycia, carved into the rock.
Take a break in the market square.
Free public restrooms near the harbor.
